events.appearance_notes: High activity; Two African-American men opened the door and entered the mobile phone store, wearing black and white vests and jeans respectively.
events.event_text: From 1.6s to 5.0s, two African-American men opened the door and entered the mobile phone store, wearing black and white vests and jeans respectively.

events.appearance_notes: High activity; The man in a white vest forcibly unplugged the three mobile phones displayed on the counter on one side.
events.event_text: From 6.9s to 10.2s, the man in a white vest forcibly unplugged the three mobile phones displayed on the counter on one side.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; Then quickly fled the store from the gate.
events.event_text: From 10.9s to 16.2s, then quickly fled the store from the gate.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; Two men appeared again leaving the scene with connected mobile phones in their hands.
events.event_text: From 19.8s to 20.2s, two men appeared again leaving the scene with connected mobile phones in their hands.
